clean.label: Clean claim
clean.reason: The policy is active on the incident date, the fraud risk score is low (0) and the covered amount ($3,700) is well below the escalation threshold. All hard rules point to approval, so the claim is approved for the covered amount.

reasons: The policy is active for the incident date (2026-06-10 falls between 2026-01-01 and 2026-12-31).
The incident type is collision, which is covered by the policy.
The coverage amount is calculated using the formula: min(estimate, limit) - deductible.
Subtracting the deductible: $4,200 - $500 = $3,700.
Police report was filed.
Claimant has no prior claims in the last 12 months.
Sufficient photos provided (6).
Claimant is the policy holder.
Claim amount ($4,200.00) is below the high-risk threshold.
Incident occurred 160 day(s) after policy effective date.
Calculated risk score: 0 based on 0 triggered red flag(s).

decision.reason: The policy is active on the incident date, the fraud risk score is low (0) and the covered amount ($3,700) is well below the escalation threshold. All hard rules point to approval, so the claim is approved for the covered amount.

deny.label: Expired policy
deny.blurb: Policy lapsed before the incident date.
deny.reason: Policy expired on 2025-12-31 and was not active on the incident date 2026-06-10, violating hard rule 1 which requires denial when the policy is not active.
